images.depicts: grey mule head, ears up, curious
mule holding silver flute to lips with hoof
wooden cube with carved bell shape on face
row of colourful wooden cubes fanned out
mule nuzzling small pyramid of coloured cubes
a HUMAN HAND holds/taps the flute near a row of glowing cubes while the mule's nose lowers toward them
images.issue: Human hand appears instead of the mule tapping the cubes with the flute itself (hoof/mouth) — breaks the animals-only visual consistency of the series.

images.depicts: a lamb/sheep-like creature plays the flute with eyes closed; the mule only nuzzles in from the side; a second fluffy sheep also visible in background
images.issue: WRONG CHARACTER: spec requires the MULE mid-performance playing the flute (book:8/verse3 'The flute and the cube! Snake can hop! Sheep can hum!'). Instead a sheep/lamb is shown playing flute and Sheep appears to be duplicated (once playing, once in background).

images.depicts: anthropomorphic potato (face, crown-like music cube on head) with flute leaning against it, blurred mule in background
images.issue: Potato has a full face (eyes/smile) — consistent with W42's potato-bridge.png style, so treated as an established running style, not flagged as an error.

images.depicts: silver flute lying on green cloth
fuzzy round plush toy with big eyes

line_map.line: The U says its NAME! Every vowel! Magic E is DONE!
C-U-B-E — cube! M-U-L-E — mule! T-U-N-E — tune!
A potato?! (NO!) P-p-potato! No magic E!
These cubes! These cubes are cute!

line_map.note: current image shows a human hand, not the mule, tapping the cubes

line_map.line: The flute and the cube! Snake can hop! Sheep can hum!
line_map.note: wrong character playing flute; duplicated Sheep

line_map.line: The flute… the tune… (shhh…) A tune?! (a potato!)

generate.line: The flute and the cube! Snake can hop! Sheep can hum! (book:8, word-song verse 3)
generate.mj_prompt: a gentle grey mule playing a silver flute mid-performance over a row of glowing music cubes, an emerald-green snake swaying beside it and one fluffy white sheep bobbing along in the background, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

a gentle grey mule tapping a row of glowing music cubes with a silver flute held in its mouth, no human hands visible, each cube glowing as it rings a note, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Shows a lamb/sheep-like creature playing the flute with eyes closed instead of the mule; the mule only nuzzles from the side; a second fluffy sheep duplicated in background.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate per mule-concert-v2.png prompt above — mule must be the flute performer.

wrong_art.issue: A human hand holds/taps the flute near the cubes instead of the mule — breaks animal-only visual consistency for the 'cubes make a tune' scene.
